PayMeGPT
Live Build Session

Every Way to Get Paid With AI

12 things your customers can build on PayMeGPT to earn or save money. One platform. No code required.

Part One

One-Offs — Cash Today

Omnichannel AI Agent

$1.5k–$10k

Build one agent, deploy it everywhere at once: web chat, SMS, Facebook, Instagram, and live phone calls. VoiceFlow and Botpress make you rebuild per channel. PMG ships it native.

Source: Fiverr & Elfsight chatbot pricing guides, 2026

Multi-Page Website

$4k–$8k

A real multi-page site from the Coding Agent. Built-in server-side keys for LLMs, Google Sheets, and Stripe mean it works out of the box. No client API setup, no hosting middleman.

Source: Jim.com & Flamingo Agency website cost guides, 2026
Signature Build

Website + Custom CRM

$6k–$13k

Customer-facing site pushes every lead into Google Sheets via Flow webhook. Then a second build reads that same sheet and renders a custom CRM. Two deliverables, one data source, one invoice.

Source: Hammani Tech, website + CRM integration add-on, 2026

Voice Phone Agent

$1k–$5k

An AI agent that answers calls, books appointments, and qualifies leads using OpenAI, Grok realtime, or ElevenLabs voice. Replaces a receptionist or answering service.

Source: Aircall AI voice agent cost breakdown, 2026

Lead-Gen Funnel

$2k–$6k

Landing page, contact form, flow, and pipeline wired end to end. Leads land, route, and get tracked automatically. Hand it off complete.

Source: Hammani Tech small business website cost guide, 2026

Loyalty / Event Wallet Pass

$300–$2k

Digital punch cards, memberships, or scannable event tickets that live in Apple Wallet. Custom apps cost $15k+ to build. PMG ships it in an afternoon.

Source: Kartle digital loyalty program cost guide, 2026
Part Two

Recurring — Build Your MRR

Managed AI Agent

$160–$600/mo

Host and tune a client's agent across chat, SMS, social, and phone. As they add channels or change scripts, you maintain it. The retainer grows as they grow.

Source: Elfsight chatbot ongoing cost guide, 2026

Auto-Comment Service

$300–$1k/mo

Every comment on a client's Facebook and Instagram posts gets an instant AI reply that captures the lead. Runs 24/7. Scales with their ad spend.

Source: LYFE Marketing social media management pricing, 2026

Email + SMS Campaigns

$500–$2k/mo

Run recurring Broadcast Hub campaigns: weekly newsletters, promo blasts, SMS offers. You handle copy, scheduling, and list management.

Source: Nutshell email & MessageIQ SMS pricing guides, 2026

Social Content

$500–$2k/mo

AI Content Generator plus Social Poster delivering scheduled posts every week across all their accounts. A predictable monthly deliverable.

Source: WebFX social media management pricing, 2026

Loyalty / Booking Management

$100–$400/mo

Issue and update Wallet Passes, run point campaigns, maintain booking pages and reminder flows. The program never stops, so neither does the billing.

Source: Revio digital loyalty program cost guide, 2026
Highest Ceiling

White-Label PMG

$97–$497/mo

Repackage the entire platform under your own brand and charge clients a monthly subscription. You stop selling builds and start selling a SaaS.

Source: PMG estimate vs. stacked competitor tool costs, 2026

One Platform.
No Code Required.

Every offer on this list is built with the tools already in your PayMeGPT dashboard.
